summary: A Fox News 'Jesse Watters Primetime' interview clip with Border Patrol Chief Greg Bovino speaking about violence against ICE, cutting to live B-roll of a protest in Charlotte, NC. The segment includes lower-thirds and chyrons.
notable_text: VIOLENCE AGAINST ICE SKYROCKETS; NOW: ANTI-ICE PROTEST IN NORTH CAROLINA; GREG BOVINO CHIEF BORDER PATROL AGENT; JESSE WATTERS PRIMETIME
